entities.name: Personal data (personal information)
entities.description: Any information about you that enables you to be identified personally. It covers information such as your name and contact details, but also includes identification numbers, electronic location data and other online identifiers that can be linked with such information in order to identify you. It does not include data where the identity has been removed (anonymous data).
